name: Imagga
tagline: Tag objects, scenes, and concepts in images
description: Analyze an image URL or a previously uploaded image with Imagga V2 and return recognized tags with localized labels and confidence scores.

auth.hint: Use the Imagga API key as the Basic-auth username and API secret as the password. Store the credential pair in Arthur MCP Secrets.

tools.name: tag_image
tools.description: Analyze an image by URL or upload identifier and return detected objects, scenes, and concepts with confidence scores.

params.name: image_url
params.description: Public URL of the image to analyze; provide either image_url or image_upload_id.

params.name: image_upload_id
params.description: Identifier returned by an earlier Imagga upload; provide either this value or image_url.

params.name: language
params.description: Language code for returned tag names; defaults to en.
